label: Pawn inventory option
description: A probabilistic inventory entry that gives a pawn a ThingDef at spawn time. Sub-options allow branching take-all or choose-one selection trees.

thingDef.label: Thing
thingDef.description: ThingDef placed in the pawn's inventory.

countRange.label: Count range
countRange.description: Integer count range of the item added to inventory. Written as min~max.

choiceChance.label: Choice chance
choiceChance.description: Probability (0–1) that this option is chosen when it competes inside a subOptionsChooseOne list.

skipChance.label: Skip chance
skipChance.description: Probability (0–1) that this option is skipped entirely even if selected.

subOptionsTakeAll.label: Sub-options (take all)
subOptionsTakeAll.description: Child inventory options all taken when this option is selected.

subOptionsChooseOne.label: Sub-options (choose one)
subOptionsChooseOne.description: Child inventory options from which exactly one is chosen by weight when this option is selected.
